SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2020 - JUDGMENT. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF EILEEN AND JONATHAN MAMMEN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALEB KAUFFMAN, REPRESENTATIVE AND OWNER FOR SK PACIFIC, INC. IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT'S ORAL TESTIMONY IS HEARD BY THE COURT. THE COURT ALSO REVIEWS DOCUCUMENTS THAT WERE SUBMITTED TO PLAINTIFF PRIOR TO TODAYS HEARING BY DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAMMEN, EILEEN MAMMEN, JONATHAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SK PACIFIC, INC. D.B.A. CAREER UP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
